message:
fix: upgrade gt wl show with structured parsing, tests, and auto-fetch (#2792)

Replaces the raw JSON map-based implementation with structured WantedItem
parsing, adds QueryWantedFull to the store interface, and introduces
comprehensive tests. Also adds JSON tags to WantedItem, new fields
(EvidenceURL, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt), auto-fetch for data freshness,
and improved clone resolution via wasteland config.

Co-Authored-By: Markus Lachinger <business@mmlac.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
